meta.description: How to use analysis tools correctly: drawing tools, indicator tools, chart tools, and computation recipes the app can implement directly.

howToUse: Place at the BODY cluster of touches, not the extreme wick.
Convert to a zone: duplicate the line at wick extreme -> the band between is the zone.
Colour-code by timeframe (e.g. D1 red, H4 orange, H1 yellow, M15 gray).
Needs minimum 2 touches to draw, 3 to validate.
Connect wicks on the higher timeframe, bodies on lower.
Expect fake breaks (trendline liquidity) — trade the break-retest, not the first break.

fibRetracement.purpose: Find pullback entry zones and targets.
howToUse: Anchor swing low -> swing high of the LAST completed impulse (reverse for downtrends).
Watch 0.5-0.618 golden zone for entries, 0.786 as final defence.
OB: cover the full candle range (or open-to-extreme refinement).
FVG: rectangle from candle1 wick to candle3 wick.
Delete mitigated zones to keep the chart clean.
Hide future candles; step candle-by-candle applying the full checklist.
Log every simulated trade in the journal exactly like a live trade.
Minimum 50 replay trades per strategy before trading it live.

computationRecipes.note: Pure formulas so the app can compute indicators itself without external libraries.
computationRecipes.EMA: k = 2/(n+1); ema[i] = close[i]*k + ema[i-1]*(1-k); seed ema[0] with SMA(n)
computationRecipes.RSI: gain/loss = diffs split by sign; use Wilder smoothing: avg = (prevAvg*(n-1)+current)/n; RSI = 100 - 100/(1+avgGain/avgLoss)
computationRecipes.ATR: tr = max(high-low, abs(high-prevClose), abs(low-prevClose)); ATR = Wilder-smoothed TR over n
computationRecipes.MACD: macd = EMA12(close) - EMA26(close); signal = EMA9(macd); histogram = macd - signal
computationRecipes.ADX: compute +DM/-DM, smooth with Wilder, DX = 100*abs(+DI - -DI)/(+DI + -DI), ADX = Wilder-smoothed DX
computationRecipes.swingDetection: pivot high: high[i] > highs of k bars each side (k=2 default); mirror for pivot low
computationRecipes.zigzag: connect pivots filtered by minimum move of x*ATR to map structure automatically

toolWorkflowForAnalysis: 2. Auto-detect swings (swingDetection) -> build structure map (HH/HL/LH/LL, BOS, CHoCH).
3. Auto-mark S/R: cluster pivot prices within 0.5*ATR bands, rank by touch count and recency.
4. Auto-detect OBs and FVGs from the structure map.
5. Compute indicator set per timeframe (EMA9/21/50/200, RSI14, MACD, ATR14, ADX14, BB20).
6. Run pattern scanner (candlestick-patterns.json detections) on M1/M5/M15.
8. Render: draw zones, structure labels, and the signal card on the chart.
bestPractices: Fewer tools, mastered deeply, beat many tools used shallowly.
Every drawn object must have a reason; delete anything you cannot justify.
Indicators CONFIRM price action; they never lead the decision.
Keep one clean 'bias' chart layout and one 'execution' layout per symbol.
